operations.rationale: Promote Antigravity model selection from provider passthrough to Agent Layer's typed agents.antigravity.model field before runtime validation rejects the passthrough key.

Agent Layer now sets CODEX_HOME=<repo>/.codex only when agents.codex.local_config_dir is true. Defaults to false, so a non-interactive upgrade switches to Codex's normal global/project config layering. Choose true to retain repo-local Codex auth, sessions, logs, and runtime state.
Agent Layer can now project a local turn-stop chime into supported provider hooks. Non-interactive upgrades keep chime disabled unless the user explicitly opts in.
